text.title: Container Security Scanning and Image Signing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Does this project build and push container images to a registry?

branch.question: Is SBOM a compliance / audit mandate?

conclusion.verdict: Trivy scan + Syft CycloneDX SBOM + cosign keyless sign
Trivy scan + cosign keyless sign (SBOM optional but recommended)

text.example: builds_images=true → sbom_required=true → Trivy + Syft CycloneDX + cosign keyless. References rule sbom-immutable.
